name: Waimea Valley
tagline: A paved botanical walk through sacred Hawaiian valley ending at a swimmable waterfall — North Shore magic.
parking: Free parking lot at entrance across from Waimea Bay
bestTime: Morning on weekdays; the waterfall pool is calmest and least crowded before noon
kamaaina: Kamaaina rate with Hawaii ID; kids 4-12 discounted, under 4 free
talkStory: Great for ages 2 and up. The 0.75-mile paved path to the waterfall is fully stroller-friendly — rare for a nature walk in Hawaii. Life jackets provided free at the falls for swimming. The botanical gardens along the way have peacocks roaming freely that kids go wild for. Bring water shoes for the rocky pool bottom. Pack snacks — the on-site cafe is limited. Combine with a stop at Waimea Bay Beach across the street.
